CustomField.description: This looks at several fields to evaluate if the item needs tracking info from SAP
CustomField.formula:
AND( fxPercentageShipped__c < 1
,Status_Code__c <> "C"
,isCOVID__c = TRUE
/* NOT(ISBLANK( PKI_Order_Summary__r.Actual_CER_date__c )),
PKI_Order_Summary__r.fxOrderPath__c = "Ready For Shipping",
PKI_Order_Summary__r.fxBlockedType__c = "nn" */
)
CustomField.label: fxNeedsTrackingInfo
